title: Crispy Eggplant Pastry Wrap
description: This light Egyptian dish features crispy eggplant wrapped in a halal-friendly shortcrust pastry that's perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Eggplant
ingredients.notes: Use firm varieties like Latakia or Kalamata.

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Pat eggplant dry with paper towels.
In a bowl, mix olive oil, salt, garlic, herbs, and tomato paste. Add minced onion, then stir in chopped eggplant until coated evenly.
Lay out the pastry sheet on a clean surface. Place half of the mixed eggplant mixture in the center of the pastry sheet.
Fold the edges of the pastry around the filling to form a wrap shape. Secure with toothpicks if needed to hold it together.
Brush the outer rim with olive oil and sprinkle remaining herbs over the top, pressing gently onto the pastry for even distribution.
Place wraps on a baking tray lined with parchment paper. Bake in preheated oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from oven, allow to cool slightly before serving. Enjoy as is or with your favorite dipping sauce.
